title: Property Consultant - RMZ Corp International Enterprises - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - RMZ Corp International Enterprises - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
We at RMZ Corp International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Property Consultant based out of Ranchi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About RMZ Corp International Enterprises:
RMZ Corp International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RMZ Corp International Enterprises!
